description: Look up running race results across NYRR, Mika Timing, Athlinks, and RaceResult by fuzzy race name, bib, runner name, or athlete history.

novel_features.name: Fuzzy race result lookup
novel_features.description: Resolve a human race name to the right provider and edition, then return a unified runner result by bib or runner name.

novel_features.name: Cross-event athlete history
novel_features.description: Show a runner's race history across Athlinks or NYRR using a name search, racer id, or the optional Athlinks current-user token.
